metadata.publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI)
metadata.extractedFrom: Table 13 (Annual Estimates of Death Rate by Sex), p.339; Table 14 (Annual Estimates of Infant Mortality Rate by Sex), p.340
metadata.note: India's own sample-registration estimates of vital rates. Crude death rate is not age-adjusted. The 2021 spike reflects COVID-19; 2022-2023 show the recovery.
metadata.label: Crude death rate
